amortMethPremDiscFees: Amort Method for Premium Discount and Fees
amorthMethPremDiscFees: Amoth Method for Premium Discount and Fees
amountOfRecDefAsLoan: Amount of Rec Def as Loan
amtOfPortHoldGtCertPer: Portfolio size greater than certain age
bsClassBuySide: Balance Sheet Class of Buy Side
bsClassCellSide: Balance Sheet Class of Buy Side
description.ACCOUNTID: In this field, the account code related to the liability will be entered.
description.ACCOUNT_CONTRACT_CODE: In this field, a code specific to that transaction must be entered for each loan transaction. Code selection will be determined by the affiliate filling this file, and these codes should not be repeated and should not be the same as any transaction code (ID) on other pages or any Customer ID defined on the Customer page. Codes that are used more than once will appear in red on the Recheck page.
description.ACCOUNT_ID: This field must be filled with a unique code for each specific transaction. The code will be specified by the subsidiary and this code should not be repeated and must not be used more than once as account id ('Account ID') on the other tables, or any 'Customer ID' defined on the 'Customer' page.
description.ACCOUNT_OPEN_DATE: This field is the area showing the account opening date.
description.ACCOUNT_TYPE: The account type will be selected from the dropdown list.
description.ACCRUED_INTEREST: It represents the interest rate accumulated in the period since the last coupon payment.
description.ACCRUED_INTEREST_AMT: It indicates the amount of interest accrual. It should be 0 since it will be valid for the debts in default.
description.ACCRUED_INTEREST_FX: It represents the interest rate accumulated in the period since the last coupon payment.
description.ACCRUED_INTEREST_TL: It represents the interest rate accumulated in the period since the last payment..
description.ADC_SIGNIFICANT_CONTRACT_FLG: It should be 1 if pre-sale or pre-lease contracts amount is signficant portion of total contracts or substantial equity at risk. Pre-sale or pre-lease contracts must be legally binding written contracts and the purchaser/renter must have made a substantial cash deposit which is subject to forfeiture if the contract is terminated. Equity at risk should be determined as an appropriate amount of borrower-contributed equity to the real estate’s appraised as-completed value.
description.AGREEMENT_CCY: The money code information of the CSA contract must be entered in this field
description.AGREEMENT_ID: This is the field where the netting contract is specified.
description.ACTIVE_ENTRIES: It is the field that specifies the active items.
description.AMORTIZATIONTERM: This field contains the amortization period.
description.REPRICINGFREQUENCYUNIT: Pricing/valuation frequency unit should be specified by selecting from the list.
description.REQUIREDRESERVEFLG: This is the field that indicates whether there is a mandatory correspondence regarding the account.
description.SECUREDIND: This feature determines whether the total risks are covered by collateral. The collaterals to be considered here will be collaterals other than margins.
description.TMP_RCHECK_ERRORS: Backup tables taken to avoid losing old records. It will be removed.
description.TMP_RULE_ERRORS: Backup tables taken to avoid losing old records. It will be removed.
description.VALUEDATE: This field is the field that specifies the value date.
description.AMORTMETHODPDFC: Premium, discount etc. Specifies the amortization methodology
description.AMORTH_METH_PREM_DISC_FEES: It refers to the method used to amortize premium, discount and other income for the product.
description.AMORTIZATION_DATE: It is considered as the date on which principal payment is made for the relevant security. Partially or fully amortized bond will be taken into account as the date of first payment of the principal.
description.APP_RCHECK_ERROR_ITEMS: It is the table where the details of the errors that occur during the reconciliation control are kept.
description.APP_RULE_ERROR_ITEMS: It is the table where the details of the errors that occur during the rule control are kept.
description.BOOKDATE: Indicates the balance sheet date of the account.
description.AMORTIZATION_TERM: Amortization term is used in conjunction with amortization term unit to define the term over which the payment is amortized (depreciated).
description.AMORTIZATION_TERM_NIT: Amortization Term Unit should be selected from the list.
description.AMORTIZATION_TERM_UNIT: Amortization term unit is used in conjunction with amortization term (AMRT_TERM) to define the term over which the payment is amortized. List of values are Days, months & years.
description.AMORTIZATION_TYPE: The amortization type of the account must be selected from the list.
description.AMORTIZATION_TYPE_CODE: The code of the account's amortization type must be selected from the list.
description.AMORTIZING_COST: It refers to the cost price of the security.
description.AMORT_METHOD_PDFC: Unique identifier of the amortization method used for premium, discount & fees. List of values are Level Yield & Straight Line; Level Yield being the default one.
description.AMORT_METH_PREM_DISC_FEES: It refers to the method used to amortize premium, discount and other income for the product.
description.AMOUNT_OF_REC_DEF_AS_LOAN: Amount of receivables defined as loan
description.AMRT_TERM: It refers to the difference between the last principal payment and the due date.
description.AMRT_TERM_PAY: It refers to the difference between the last principal payment and the due date.
description.AMRT_TERM_REC: It refers to the difference between the last principal payment and the due date.
description.AMRT_TERM_UNIT: It refers to the unit type in which the difference between the last principal payment of the transaction and the maturity date is calculated. Selection will be made from the list.
description.AMRT_TERM_UNIT_PAY: It refers to the unit type in which the difference between the last principal payment of the product in question and the maturity date is calculated. Selection will be made from the list. (Paid)
description.AMRT_TERM_UNIT_REC: It refers to the unit type in which the difference between the last principal payment of the product in question and the maturity date is calculated. Selection will be made from the list. (Received)
description.AMT_OF_PORTFOLIO_HOLD_GT_CER: Portfolio size greater than certain age
description.AMT_OF_PORT_HOLD_GT_CERT_PER: Portfolio size greater than certain age
description.APPRAISAL_NAME: The title of the expert company will be entered.
description.APPRAISAL_TAX_NO: The tax number of the expert company will be entered.
description.APP_TREND_ANALYSIS: Varition trends can be viewed as graph via created queries.
description.ASSETS_W_FIXED_INTEREST: Assets with fixed interest rate that will be matured within 6 months.
description.ASSETS_W_FLOATING_INTEREST: Assets with floating interest rate that will be repriced within 6 months.
description.ASSET_ACCOUNTS: It is the field that indicates the active items.
description.ASSET_ACCOUNT_ORDER: It is the code indicating the order of active items in the balance sheet format.
description.ASSET_SIZE: This field should be filled with the asset size of the counterparty.
description.BALANCE_AMT_FX: As of the reporting date, the principal and rediscount amounts will be given in the original currency.
description.BALANCE_AMT_TL: As of the reporting date, the principal and rediscount amounts will be given in local currency.
description.BALANCE_NOT_REPAID_FLG: Facilities such as credit cards and charge cards where the balance has been repaid in full at each scheduled repayment date for the previous 12 months.
description.BALANCE_SHEET_CLASS: The class of the transaction on the balance sheet will be selected from the list.
description.BANKING_TRADING_FLAG: It refers the book in which transaction is recorded (Banking Book or Trading Book)
description.BARRIERONE_DIRECTION: It refers to the direction of barrier 1
description.BARRIERONE_HIT_DATE: It refers the date of hitting barrier 1 value.
description.BARRIERONE_HIT_FLAG: It indicates whether it has reached the barrier 1 value.
description.BARRIERTWO_DIRECTION: It refers to the direction of barrier 2
description.BARRIERTWO_HIT_DATE: It refers the date of hitting barrier 2 value.
description.BARRIERTWO_HIT_FLAG: It indicates whether it has reached the barrier 2 value.
description.BARRIER_CURRENCY: Exchange rate information of the barrier will be included.
description.BARRIER_DIRECTION: It refers to the barrier direction.
description.BARRIER_HIT_DATE: It refers the date of hitting barrier value.
description.BARRIER_HIT_FLAG: It indicates whether it has reached the barrier value.
description.BARRIER_ID: The barrier type of the product will be included. (Single Barrier / Double Barrier / Window Barrier)
description.BOND_ENCUMBERED_FLAG: This field will be filled with one of the 'free / collateral / repo subject / derivative subject / reverse repo subject' options. If reverse repo selection is made, '30_GUN_ICINDE_NAKIT_GIRISI' field will be left blank due to the security in question.
description.BOND_FWD_FLAG: It expresses whether the security is subject to the purchase / sale of forward value securities.
description.BOND_ISIN_CODE: If underlying is bond, the ISIN number of the relevant option must be recorded.
description.BOND_STRIKE_PRICE: It refers the strike price of the bond.
description.BOOK_DATE: This column refers to the book date of the account.
description.BS_CLASS_BUY_SIDE: It refers balance sheet classification of buy side
description.BS_CLASS_CELL_SIDE: The place where the Buying Leg is kept in the off-balance calculations will be fed. Proceed will be made by choosing from the list. Ex: 'Money Purchase Options'
description.BS_CLASS_SELL_SIDE: It refers balance sheet classification of sell side
description.BUSINESS_DAY_CONV: In cases where the coupon payment coincides with a holiday, it specifies the method used to determine the date of payment. While filling this field, one of the regular / modified options will be selected.
description.BUSINESS_DAY_RULE: It specifies the method used to determine the date of payment in cases where the coupon payment coincides with a holiday. When filling this field, one of the preceding / following / end month / none options will be selected.
description.BUSINESS_DAY_RULE_CONV: Specifies the method used to determine the day of payment when the coupon payment falls on the holiday.
description.BUSINESS_DAY_RULE_RULE: Specifies the rule used to determine the day of payment when the coupon payment falls on the holiday.
description.BUY_SELL_FLAG: It refers to the buy/sell distinction of the product.
description.BUY_SELL_FLAG_TRS_CDS: Protection buyer / protection seller separation for CDS and TRS Transactions
description.CALL_PUT_FLAG: Call or put should be selected according to the type of option.
description.CAP_FLAG: Indicates whether the option is a cap contract
description.CAP_RATE: The interest rate set for the cap option should be fed.
description.CASH_INFLOW_IN_THIRTHY_DAYS: Refers to the amount of cash inflow to be realized over the relevant security within 30 days.
description.CASH_INFLOW_IN_THIRTY_DAYS: It refers to the amount of cash inflow to be realize within 30 days.
description.CASH_IN_WITH_THIRTY_DAYS: Cash inflows (including principal and interest) to be made within 30 days regarding the relevant transaction should be written. '0' must be entered in the 'Cash in within 30 days' field for the non-maturity assets.
description.CASH_OUTFLOW_IN_THIRTY_DAYS: It refers to the amount of cash outflow to be realize within 30 days.
description.CASH_OUT_IN_THIRTY_DAYS: Cash outflow (including principal and interest)within 30 days for the transaction should be given in this column. For non-maturity liabilities, the principal and rediscount amounts entered in the 'Total Balance Amount FX' field should be given in the 'Cash outflow within 30 days' field.
description.CASH_OUT_FLOW_IN_THIRTY_DAYS: It can be scheduled within the relevant period for 30 days.
description.CHECK_ID: It is the field that holds the control information.
description.CB_MIN_RES_AMT: This column stores the minimum reserve amount required by central bank.
description.CCF_BALANCE: The risk amount should be given after the internal credit conversion factor applied.
description.CCP_COUNTERPARTY_RK: Refers to the reference number of the central counterparty.
description.CCP_FLAG: It contains information whether the other party of the related transaction is a central clearing house.
description.CC_CASH_BAL_AMT: This field indicates the cash advance amount in total principal balance for credit cards.
description.CC_INSTALLMENT_AMT: This field indicates the installment amount in total principal balance for credit cards.
description.CC_MIN_PMT_AMT: Minimum payment amount must be entered for credit cards.
description.CC_NONCASH_BAL_AMT: This field indicates the non-installment amount in total principal balance for credit cards.
description.CC_PMT_DUE_DT: The payment due date must be entered for credit cards.
description.CC_TOT_TRANSFER_AMT: This column indicates the amount transferred from other credit cards.
description.CDO_ATTACHMENT_POINT: In CDO (Collateralized Debt Liabilities) transactions, it refers attachment point
description.CDO_DETACHMENT_POINT: In CDO (Collateralized Debt Liabilities) transactions, it refers detachment point
description.CDO_POSITION: For credit derivatives, it refers to the long/short position
description.COLLATERAL_AGR: If there is a netting agreement signed for the relevant transaction, it must be entered here. If there is no contract, it will be left blank.
description.COLLATERAL_AMT_FX: It expresses the net collateral value. (Capital Adequacy Regulation Annex-2 / Article 11)
description.COLLATERAL_AMT_TL: It expresses the net collateral value. (Capital Adequacy Regulation Annex-2 / Article 11)
description.COLLATERAL_CCY: The money code information of the deposit balance must be entered.
description.COLLATERAL_COUNTRY_CD: The Collateral Country Code information to be entered in this field will be selected from the list.
description.COLLATERAL_FAIR_VALUE: The original principal value of the expertise value of the collateral will be entered in this field.
description.COLLATERAL_ID: This column stores the unique identifier of the posted collateral.
description.COLLATERAL_MATURITY_DATE: The maturity date of the collateral will be entered.
description.COLLATERAL_NO: The number to be entered in this field will be determined by the company filling the form and a separate number must be used for each collateral.
description.COMMITMENT_AMT: This field indicates the commitment amount for the account.
description.COMMON_COA_CODE: Indicates the code indicating the position of the account in the main balance sheet items. This field will be selected from the list and filled.
description.COMPOUINDING_FREQ: The compound used for calculating the interest income represents the frequency of interest calculation.
description.COMPOUNDING_FREQ: This column stores compounding frequency, which is used to calculate interest income. Compounded interest is calculated only when the compounding frequency is < Payment frequency List of values are Daily, monthly, quarterly, semi annual, Annual, simple, continuous, at maturity & other.
description.COMPOUNDING_FREQ_PAY: It refers to the frequency of the compound interest used for the calculation of the interest paid.
description.COMPOUNDING_FREQ_REC: It refers to the frequency of compound interest calculation used for the interest calculation.
description.CONTRACT_AMOUNT: Expresses the number of contracts related to the related position.
description.CONTRACT_COST_VALUE: It refers to the cost value of the relevant future contract.
description.CONTRACT_SIZE: It refers to the contract size of the relevant contract.
description.CONTROL_DEFICIENCY_EXTERNAL: Total significant open findings (External auditors' findings) - Control Deficiency
description.CONTROL_DEFICIENCY_INTERNAL: Total significant open findings (internal auditors' findings) - Control Deficiency
description.CONTROL_DEFICIENCY_ISBANK: Total significant open findings (Isbank auditors' findings) - Control Deficiency
description.CONTROL_WEAKNESS_EXTERNAL: Total significant open findings (External auditors' findings) - Control Weakness
description.CONTROL_WEAKNESS_INTERNAL: Total significant open findings (internal auditors' findings) - Control Weakness
description.CONTROL_WEAKNESS_ISBANK: Total significant open findings (Isbank auditors' findings) - Control Weakness
description.CONVERSION_RATE: It is the rate that shows how many underlying assets a warrant entitles to buy or sell.
description.COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD: Cost of goods sold from Income Statement
description.COUNTERPARTY_TRANSACTOR_FLG: It is the field where transactor (regular payable) retail customers are marked under Basel IV.
description.COUNTERPARTY_TYPE: The type of counterparty should be entered
description.COUNTER_PARTY_TYPE: Refers to the type of counterparty where the REPO transaction is carried out (CBRT, Undersecretariat of Treasury, Other MB, Other)
description.COUNTRY_IDENTIFIER: This field of ​​the country code should be chosen from the elective list on the opposite side (eg for Turkey 'TR'). Countries and associated country codes are provided on the 'Country' page in this file.
description.COUPON_RATE: It refers to the coupon rate of the security. If variable interest security is paid, the last paid interest rate information must be entered.
description.CREDIT_ACCOUNT_NUMBER: In this field, a code specific to that transaction must be entered for each loan transaction. Code selection will be determined by the affiliate filling this file, and these codes should not be repeated and should not be the same as any transaction code ('ID') on other pages or any 'Customer ID' defined on the 'Customer' page. Codes that are used more than once will appear in red on the 'Recheck' page.
description.CREDIT_TYPE: Spot or Revolving type will be selected from the list according to the type of the transaction. For accounts provide a borrower with a maximum limit and allows for varying credit availability must be selected as 'Revolving'. 'Spot' will be selected for spots where the limit allocation is equal to the risk balance and for loans which have monthly installment payments.
description.CRM_EFFECTIVE_DATE: In this field, the date when the collateral started to be taken into account will be entered.
description.CRM_SUPPLIER_NATIONAL_ID: In this area, TCKN information will be available for individuals who are VKN for institutions, including the guarantor. Apart from these two data, letters etc. Any information containing should not be entered.
description.CRM_TYPE: It is the field that indicates the collateral type. (Cash / Commercial real estate / residential real estate / guarantee / warranty
description.CST_RELATIONSHIP: This attribute indicates whether the customer is having an established relationship with the bank, judging by IsBank's classification of an established relationship.
description.CST_TOTAL_RISK: This value stores the total risk of the customer in TL. It will be left as blank.
description.CST_TOTAL_RISK_FX: This value stores the total risk of the customer in orijinal currency. It will be left as blank.
description.CST_TOTAL_RISK_TP: This value stores the total risk of the customer in TL. It will be left as blank.
description.CURRENCYBUYSIDE: The currency unit of the underlying underlying asset for FX transactions (For example: For the dollar purchase right, this field will be entered in dollars.) If the underlying asset is a commodity, commodity code will be entered.
description.CURRENCYSELLSIDE: For FX transactions, the currency unit of the amount to be paid in return for the purchase of underlying underlying asset (For example, if TL is to be paid for the right to buy dollars, this field will be entered as TL.) If there is a sale of commodity assets, the commodity code will be entered.
description.CURRENCY_BUY_SIDE: It refers currency for buy side of transaction
description.CURRENCY_CD: The currency of the collateral to be entered in this field will be selected from the list.
description.CURRENCY_CODE: This field represents the currency of the transaction.
description.CURRENCY_CODE_DERIV_BUY: Fund component refers to the currency of buy side of the derivative product.
description.CURRENCY_CODE_DERIV_SELL: Fund component refers to the currency of sell side of the derivative product.
description.CURRENCY_SELL_SIDE: It refers currency for sell side of transaction
description.CURRENT_BALANCE: Current balance remaining after the principal payment for the security
description.CURRENT_INTEREST_RATE_PAY: Refers to the interest rate to be paid.
description.CURRENT_INTEREST_RATE_REC: Refers to the interest rate to be received.
description.CURRENT_PAYMENT: If there is a payment on the principal, this field is filled. For payments made in the form of bullet bond, it will be fed as 0.
description.CURRENT_PAYMENT_AMOUNT: If there is a payment on the principal, this field is filled. For payments made in the form of bullet bond, it will be fed as 0.
description.CURRENT_PAYMENT_PAY: It refers the current amount paid for the swap transaction.
description.CURRENT_PAYMENT_REC: It refers the current amount received for the swap transaction.
description.CURRENT_PRINCIPAL_OUTSTANDIN: The balance sheet balance in foreign currency defined in the 'Money Code' field of the credit will be entered in the Foreign Currency Receivable field. If the loan is in TL, the same amounts will be entered in the TP and FC fields (in other words, the TP and FC fields must be filled in each line with data entry).
description.CUR_GROSS_INTEREST_RATE: It refers to gross interest rate.
description.CUR_PAYMENT_AMT: It is the field that indicates the current payment amount.
description.CUSTOMER_CLASS: The customer group should be entered in accordance with the Regulation on the Procedures and Principles Regarding the Classification of Loans and Provisions to be Reserved.
description.CUSTOMER_COUNTRY_CD: This field of the country codes must be filled by selecting the codes from the elective list. (i.e. 'TR' for Turkey). Countries and related country codes are given in the 'Country' document.
description.CUSTOMER_GROUP_CD: If the related company is a subsidiary, this field must be filled. This field should be left as blank for the companies which are not connected to a group. For the companies which are connected  to more than one group, this field must be filled by one of them. A new counterparty record must be registered for the groups defined for the first time. (i.e.: A company that has a loan relationship with Arçelik should fill the 'Group Name' as 'KOC' and then must create a new record for Koç Group on this page(if it is not existed), as 'KOC' in the 'Customer Number' field.
description.CUSTOMER_GROUP_NAME: This field should be filled with the name of the risk group that the counterparty involved in.
description.CUSTOMER_ID: VKN/TCKN information should be entered for the customers with the country code 'TR', and for other customers, a unique value with maximum 8 digits should be input to this column. If the counterparty is on the rated banks list, the customer number in that list should be used. Values like '.', ',', '-', space, characters should not be used in coding. The code will be assigned by the subsidiary and a unique code must be used for the each counterparty (i.e.: 123). The specified code will be used in the 'Customer Number' field which identifies the counterparty, in other pages of this file. The code must not be the same with any 'Credit Account Number' in any page or any other 'Customer Number' in this page. An assigned 'Customer Number' for a specific company should be used only for this company in the same way, in entire file.
description.CUSTOMER_NAME: The full name of the counterparty must be registered to this coulmn. (i.e.: ABCCElikTicaretAS, AkbankTAS, KocGrubu)
description.CUSTOMER_NATIONAL_ID: This field should be registered with ID number for individuals, TIN for institutions. Apart from these two types of information, any other data with characters etc. should never be registered in here.
description.CUSTOMER_NO: VKN / TCKN information should be entered for customers whose country code is 'TR'. For other customers, a single numerical value of not more than 8 digits should be entered. If the other party is on the ranked bank list shared by our bank, the customer numbers in that list should be used. There should be no values ​​like '.', ',', '-, spaces, characters in the coding. No character should be used. Code selection will be made by the company that fills out the form and a separate code must be used for each other party (Ex: 123).
description.CUSTOMER_NUMBER: The derivative indicates the opposite side of the transaction.
description.CUSTOMER_SECTOR: This field will be entered only in December; There will be no entry in March, June and September. The sector of the other party will be selected from the list.
description.CUSTOMER_SIZE: This stores the size of the party whether micro, small, medium or large. This is explicitly required for RBI reporting. LOV: Micro, Small, Medium, Large
description.CUSTOMER_TIN: This field should be registered with ID number for individuals, TIN for institutions. Apart from these two types of information, any other data with characters etc. should never be registered in here.
description.CUSTOMER_TURNOVER_AMT_TP: This field should be filled with the turnover amount of the counterparty.
description.CUSTOMER_TYPE: In this column, the type of the counterparty must be selected (such as type of Banks for banks, brokerage houses and financial institutions which are subject to BRSA supervision). In Customer Characteristic document, there is a detailed list that contains the example in this regard. For the organization that are not in that list but have similar features with the organizations in that list should be selected as the organization with the closest features.
description.CUSTOMER_TYPE_DESC: Description of the customer class must be entered in this field.
description.DAILY_ACCRUAL_AMT: In this field, daily accrual amount in the original currency must be given.
description.DAILY_ACCRUED_INTEREST: It represents the accumulated interest amount per day.
description.DAILY_INTEREST_ACCRUED: It represents the accumulated interest amount per day.
description.DAILY_INTEREST_AMT: It refers the daily interest amount accrued.
description.DAILY_INTEREST_RATE: It represents the accumulated interest amount per day.
description.DAILY_UNIT_VALUE: Refers to the daily unit value of the fund component.
description.DAY_COUNT_BASIS: It specifies the day counting method that will be the basis for calculating the loan interest.
description.DAY_COUNT_INDICATOR: It specifies the day counting method that will be the basis for calculating the loan interest.
description.DEBT_SECURITY_FLAG: It is a field for the type of security. If it is covered bond or RMBS, it will be filled as N if not Y.
description.DEFERRED_CURRENT_BALANCE: It is the area where non-amortized premiums and discounts, which can be considered as income / expense in the future, are specified.
description.DEFERRED_CUR_AMT: Deferred Current Balance refers to Current non-amortized deferred balance representing future income/expense such as premium, discount, fees, and costs.
description.DEFERRED_CUR_BALANCE: It refers to the current balance showing the amount of non-amortized income / cost to be obtained in the future periods.
description.DELTA: It refers to the delta value of the option.
description.DERIVATIVE_MATURITY_DATE: Fund component indicates the maturity date of the derivative.
description.DERIVATIVE_POSITION: Refers to the long / short position regarding a derivative transaction.
description.DERIVATIVE_TYPE: It refers the type of derivative
description.DISCOUNT_CURVE: The yield curve to be taken into account for the securities in question must be entered.
description.DOWN_BARRIER_CURRENCY: It expresses the exchange rate information of the down barrier.
description.DOWN_BARRIER_VALUE: It expresses the down barrier value.
description.DPD_NINETY_FLG: This field should be filled with HAYIR by deafult since this table includes off balance sheet items.
description.DRAWDOWN_FLG: Obligors in relation to overdraft facilities would also be considered as transactors if there has been no drawdowns over the previous 12 months
description.DUE_DILIGENCE_RATING: This field is generated for Basel IV; If there is a difference after the due diligence of the CRA grades by the Bank, the final grade will be fed into this field.
description.EARLY_EXERCISE_DATE: This column stores the early exercise date.
description.EARLY_REDEMPTION_FLAG: It refers the having right to end swap transaction early
description.EBITDA: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization
description.EFFECTIVE_DATE: It refers to the date on which the contract came into force.
description.EFF_MATURITY: This value specifies effective maturity calculated in accordance with Internal Rating Based Approach.
description.ENABLE_ACCEPT: It is the area where it is determined whether the announcement should be submitted for approval or not.
description.ENABLE_POPUP: Indicates whether the announcement can be presented as a 'popup'.
description.ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT: It expresses the unusable part of the security in terms of amount.
description.ENTITY: Refers to participation information in the data to be filled in by RPA.
description.EOP_BALANCE: In this field, the balance of the account including the end-of-period principal and interest accrual must be input.
description.EOP_BOOK_BALANCE: This column stores the current gross book balance.
description.EOPBALANCE: Indicates the balance sheet balance at the end of the period.
description.EOP_GROSS_BOOK_BALANCE: Refers to the gross balance sheet balance at the end of the period.
description.EOP_NET_PAR_BALANCE: Refers to the net balance sheet balance.
description.EQUITY_TRADED_FLAG: Check to show if the company is public. If Y is checked, it means that it is traded on the stock market.
description.EQUITYTRADEDFLAG: Tick to show if the company is publicly traded. If Y is marked, it means it is traded on the exchange.
description.EUROPEAN_AMERICAN_FLAG: European or American should be chosen according to the type of option.
description.EXCHANGE_OF_PRINCIPAL: It indicates whether there is an obligation to exchange principal
description.EXCHANGE_PRINCIPAL_FLAG: It is the area that indicates whether there is a major currency exchange.
description.EXT_RATING_AGENCY: The relevant rating agency should be selected from the optional list.
description.EXT_RATING_DATE: This column stores the date of external degree
description.EXT_RATING_TYPE: From the list, 'SOVEREIGN' should be selected for foreign country treasures, 'BANK' for foreign banks and 'CORP' for corporate firms. For instruments such as securities, INSTRUMENT must be entered, for other products NON-INSTRUMENT DEBT must be entered.
description.EXT_RATING_VALUE: Long-term credit rating for FITCH and short and / or long-term credit rating for JSR-ER will be included in this field, and the rating value to be included here should be determined from the list on the 'Rating Table' page.
description.FACE_VALUE: It refers to the 'face value' of the securities.
description.FAIR_VALUE: It refers to the fair value.
description.FINISHED_PROPERTY_FLG: This field is generated within the scope of Basel IV; It will be coded as 1 (finished property) and 0 (under construction). Finished property: the property securing the exposure must be fully completed. This requirement does not apply to forest and agricultural land.
description.FLOAT_LEG_FREQ_PAY_UNIT: Unit of payment frequency of variable leg (paid)
description.FLOAT_LEG_FREQ_REC_UNIT: Payment frequency unit of variable leg (rec)
description.FLOOR_FLAG: Indicates whether the option is a floor contract.
description.FLOOR_RATE: The interest rate set for the floor option must be fed.
description.FRA_TERM_MONTHS: It specifies the term of the Forward Rate Agreement product.
description.FRA_TERM_MONTHS_UNIT: It specifies the maturity unit of the Forward Rate Agreement product.
description.FREE_CAPITAL: Financial statement equity - (non-performing loans + subsidiaries + affiliate companies + fixed assets + illiquid assets)
description.FUND_COMPONENT: Refers to the component of the relevant fund.
description.FUND_COMPONENT_CPTY: Refers to the counterparty of the fund component.
description.FUND_EQ_AMT: It is the equity amount of the fund.
description.FUND_TITLE: This column contains the name of the fund.
description.FUTURE_CONTRACT_MARKET_PRICE: It represents the current market value of the future transaction.
description.FUTURE_CONTRACT_SIZE: It refers to the contract size of the relevant contract.
description.FX_INDEXED_FLAG: It is the flag field that indicates whether the liability is indexed to foreign currency.
description.FX_INDEXED_FLG: It is the flag that indicates whether the loan is indexed to foreign currency.
description.GAMMA: Refers to the gamma value of the option.
description.GENERAL_PROVISION_AMT_FX: In this field, general provision amount in original currency must be entered.
description.GENERAL_PROVISION_AMT_TL: In this field, general provision amount in local currency should be entered.
description.GENERAL_PROVISION_FX: The general provision for the said security is the amount of FC.
description.GENERAL_PROVISION_TL: The general provision for the said security represents the TL amount.
description.GI_CODE: This field refers to the check information on which the account is tracked.
description.GL_CODE: It represents the general ledger code of the transaction.
description.GROSS_SPREAD: The column stores the spread or margin that is added (in case of asset it will be a positive spread and for liability it will be a negative spread) to the benchmark floating rate for all adjustable rate instruments, this is the rate that is offered to the customer.
description.HEDGED_EXP_FLG: For unhedged retail and residential real estate exposures to individuals where the lending currency differs from the currency of the borrower’s source of income, banks will apply a 1.5 times multiplier to the applicable risk weight.
description.HIGHEST_GROUP_A_EXP: Hightest loan amount allocated within Group A companies
description.HIGHEST_GROUP_B_EXP: Hightest loan amount allocated within Group B companies
description.HIGHEST_GROUP_C_EXP: Hightest loan amount allocated within Group C companies
description.HIGHEST_INDIVIDUAL_CUSTOMER_: Exposure of customer/group company with highest loan amount.
description.HIGHEST_INDIV_CUSTOMER_EXP: Exposure of customer/group company with highest loan amount.
description.HIGHEST_SECTOR_EXP: Highest loan amount allocated to any particular sector
description.HOLIDAY_CALC_OPTION_CD: To provide choice between Just shifting the dates for holiday calendar and recalculating the payments based on the new dates.
description.HOLIDAY_CALC_OPT_CODE: To provide choice between Just shifting the dates for holiday calendar and recalculating the payments based on the new dates.
description.HOLIDAY_DISPLAY_CD: To capture the holiday calendar code as per the holiday calendar defined through the UI
description.HOLIDAY_ROLLING_CONVENTION_C: This column stores the holiday rolling convention code, based on which the date on which cash flow has to happen is decided. This includes - Following business day, Modified following business day, Previous business day, Modified previous business day etc.
description.HOUSING_UNIT_NO: This field is generated within the scope of Basel IV;  It is used for the criterion <the property is a one-to-four family residential housing unit>.
description.HQLA_ELIGIBLE_FLAG: It is stated when the interest payment was made for the said security.
description.HQLAELIGFLG: Eligibility to include HQLA in stock. Reference: BRSA ART 5 - 2a-2d.
description.HQLA_ELIG_FLG: Eligibility for HQLA to be included in the stock. Reference to BRSA ART 5 - 2a-2d
description.HYPOTHEC_AMOUNT: The mortgage amount of the bank on the collateral will be entered in this field.
description.HYPOTHEC_DEGREE: Information about the degree of mortgage will be written.
description.HYPOTHEC_NO: The number to be entered in this field will be determined by the company filling the form and a separate number must be used for each collateral.
description.ILLIQUID_ASSETS: Illiquid assets that cannot be liquadated because of legal restrictions or market conditions.
description.ILLIQUID_DERIVATIVES_FLAG: Derivative refers to whether the transaction is liquid or not.
description.INCOME_PROD_RE_FLG: It will be used to distinguish income generating real estate under Basel 4.
description.INDEPENDENT_COLLATERAL_AMT_F: It refers to the net amount found by subtracting the amount of guarantees sent by the counterparty to the bank as the initial guarantee from the amount of guarantees sent by the bank to the opposite party. (the amount of change is not taken into account) (Capital Adequacy Regulation Annex-2 / Article 11)
description.INDEPENDENT_COLLATERAL_AMT_T: It refers to the net amount found by deducting the amount of guarantees sent by the counterparty to the bank as the initial guarantee from the amount of guarantees sent by the bank to the opposite party. (the amount of change is not taken into account) (Capital Adequacy Regulation Annex-2 / Article 11)
description.INITIAL_INDEX_VALUE: The inflation index value on the product's issue date.
description.INSTRUMENT_CCY: The currency code of the relevant security will be entered
description.INSTRUMENT_CODE: It is an area to be filled in for the issued securities.
description.INSTRUMENT_START_DATE: If this date is not available, issue date will be accepted.
description.INSTRUMENT_TYPE_CD: This field will be filled with the product category of the account. It will be selected from the list.
description.INSTRUMENT_TYPE_CODE: This column indicates the product category to which the account belongs. It must be filled by making a selection from the dropdown list.
description.INSURANCE_SCHEME_CODE: This column stores the unique code associated with the insurance scheme of the account.
description.INTEREST_ACCRUAL_AMT: This field stores interest accrual amount.
description.INTEREST_ACCRUED: It represents the interest rate accumulated in the period since the last interest payment.
description.INTEREST_CALCULATION_METHOD: It refers to the method of interest calculation used for interest calculation.
description.INTEREST_CALC_METHOD_PAY: It refers to the interest calculation method used for the interest calculation paid.
description.INTEREST_CALC_METHOD_REC: It refers to the frequency of compound interest calculation used for the interest calculation.
description.INTEREST_DATE: This area indicates the current interest rate.
description.INTEREST_METHOD: This column stores the method of computing interest. List of valid values are Simple and Compounded.
description.INTEREST_PAYMENT_AMOUNT: The column stores the interest amount of the payment made.
description.INTEREST_PAYMENT_FREQUENCY: It contains information on how often interest payments are made. (Ex: 6) (Month, year, day entry will be fed by the Interest Payment Frequency Unit field.)
description.INTEREST_PAYMENT_FREQUENCY_U: It will be entered as D (Day), M (Month) Y (Year).
description.INTEREST_PAYMENT_FREQ_PAY: It indicates how often the interest payment is made.
description.INTEREST_PAYMENT_FREQ_REC: It indicates how often the interest payment is received from the other party.
description.INTEREST_PAYMENT_FREQ_UNIT_P: Specifies the unit of the frequency of interest payments.
description.INTEREST_PAYMENT_FREQ_UNIT_R: Specifies the unit of the frequency of interest purchase.
description.INTEREST_PMT_DATE: This column indicates the first interest payment date as of the reporting date.
description.INTEREST_PMT_FREQ: This is the area that indicates the frequency of payments.
description.INTEREST_PMT_FREQ_UNIT: It is the area that indicates the unit regarding the frequency of interest payments.
description.INTEREST_PMT_TIMING: This column identifies if the interest payment type is in advance or in arrears. If the value is selected as Arrears than interest payments are paid at the end of the payment period along with the principal payments. If the value is selected as Advance than Interest payments are paid at the beginning of the payment period starting from the origination date.
description.INTEREST_RATE: The column refers to the applied interest rate.
description.INTEREST_RATE_CODE_PAY: Interest rate code at which the payment is made
description.INTEREST_RATE_CODE_REC: The interest rate code on which the payment was received
description.INTEREST_RATE_TYPE_PAY: The type of interest in which the payment is made (One of the Fixed / Floating options will be selected.)
description.INTEREST_RATE_TYPE_REC: The type of interest from which the payment is received (One of the Fixed / Floating options will be selected.)
description.INTEREST_SPREAD: Additional interest on the reference interest rate for a floating rate security
description.INTEREST_TYPE: An account can be offered a fixed or floating rate type and in some cases a no rate type which is stored in the interest type column.
description.INTERNAL_DISCOUNT_RATE: The fund component refers to the internal discount rate of the security.
description.INTERNAL_SME_LIST: 'This column stores customer's classification in the SME list. Values:1. N: Customer is not present in the SME List, 2. S: Customer is in the SME list and it also has the ‘SME’ Customer flag,3. C: Customer is in the SME list but the customer is not flagged as SME, which means that the customer has to be flagged as CORPORATE'
description.INTRA_GROUP_FLAG: It expresses the status of being an intra-group transaction.
description.INT_PAY_FREQ: It includes information on how often interest payments are made. (e.g., 6) (Month, year, day entry will be fed by the Interest Payment Frequency Unit field.)
description.INT_PAY_FREQ_UNIT: It refers to the unit of payment frequency. Selection will be made from the list.
description.INVESTMENT_CLASS: This area will be fed in a unified way, where it is kept in the balance sheet and the type of securities. Proceed will be made by choosing from the list. Ex: 'AS_TC Treasury Debt Securities'
description.INVESTMENT_TYPE: The type of security will be fed into this field. (Government bonds, private sector bonds, etc.)
description.INVEST_GRADE_CPTY_FLG: This field is used in determining the investable corporate customers within the scope of Basel IV.
description.IN_DEFAULT_FLG: It refers to whether or not to default.
description.IRB_CLASS: Within the scope of IRB approach, the category of specialized loans should be selected.
description.IR_OPTION_TYPE: If this option is an interest option, its type will be selected from the relevant list.
description.ISIN_CODE: This column stores a unique Code representing a particular Instrument. This code can be ISIN Code, CUSIP, SEDOL etc. This field will be used when the underlying asset is a bond.
description.ISSUER_TRS_CDS: It refers to the issuer information for the TRS and CDS transactions in question. (Valid for TRS and CDS transactions)
description.ISSUE_DATE: Date of issue of the security
description.KNOCK_OUT_FLAG: It refers to the status of underlying becoming 'knock-out'.
description.LARGE_FINANCIAL_FLG: If financial sector entity itself or one of its subsidiaries subject to BRSA regulation or authorities of foreign country and entity’s total assets, calculated on an individual or consolidated basis, are greater than or equal to 192,5 billion threshold using year-end financial statement; this field should be selected as “TRUE”
description.LAST_APPRAISAL_DATE: The most recent appraisal date of the mortgage will be entered.
description.LAST_PAYMENT_DATE: Immediate past date on which the payment was made to the account.
description.LAST_PAYMENT_DATE_PAY: It refers to the date on which the last payment was made.
description.LAST_PAYMENT_DATE_REC: It refers to the date on which the last payment was received.
description.LAST_REPRICE_DATE: It represents the date of the future interest rate change.
description.LAST_UPDATED_BY: User Who Last Updated the Data
description.LCR_FC: Liquidity coverage ratio for foreign currencies (other than local currency)
description.LCR_TOTAL: Total liquidity coverage ratio (foreign + local currency)
description.LEG_TYPE: This column stores whether derivative leg is payable or receviable. In non-derivative transactions, this column must be 0. In derivative transactions; column must be 1 for payable and 2 receivable leg.
description.LGD: In this field, loss given default for the loan should be given.
description.LIABILITIES_W_FIXED_INTEREST: Liabilities with fixed interest rate that will be matured within 6 months.
description.LIABILITIES_W_FLOATING_INTER: Liabilities with floating interest rate that will be repriced within 6 months.
description.LIABILITY_ACCOUNTS: It is the name of liability account.
description.LIABILITY_ORDER: It is the order of liability account.
description.LIAB_UND_REQ_RES: It expresses the status of being subject to reserve requirement calculation.
description.LIAB_W_FLOATING_INTEREST: Liabilities with floating interest rate that will be repriced within 6 months.
description.LIMIT: For the credits specified as 'Revolving' in the 'Credit Type' field, the limit amount will be entered with the currency defined in the 'Currency Code' field. For the loans specified as 'Spot', this field should be filled with the balance in the 'Principal FX' field.
description.LIMIT_FX: USD equivalent of the limit amount defined in FX shall be entered.
description.LIMIT_TL: The limit amount defined in TL will be entered in TL.
description.LOCAL_CCY_FLG: Indicates that the Relevant Rating applies to risks in the country's local currency
description.LOSS_GIVEN_DEFAULT: Loss given default estimation should be written.
description.MAIL_STATUS: It is the field that indicates the Mail Status.
description.MAINACCOUNTINGCODE: Financial code specific to the type of product involved
description.MAIN_ACCOUNTING_CODE: This field indicates the code that represents the position of the account in the main balance sheet items. It will be selected from the list.
description.MAIN_RISK_FACTOR: It refers to the risk factor that underpins the derivative transaction.
description.MAJOR_INDEX_FLAG: It refers to the status of the securities if listed in a large index. (It will be fed as Y / N.)
description.MARGIN: It refers to the contractual margin rate added to the pricing index.
description.MARGIN_FLAG: It is the field where the transaction is made with margin
description.MARGIN_PAYABLE: It refers to the variable interest margin to be paid.
description.MARGIN_RECEIVABLE: It refers to the variable interest margin to be received.
description.MARGIN_TRESHOLD_AMT_FX: It expresses the threshold risk amount of the bank that must be exceeded in order to obtain collateral from the other party (Capital Adequacy Regulation, Annex-2 / Article 11).
description.MARGIN_TRESHOLD_AMT_TL: It expresses the threshold risk amount of the bank that must be exceeded in order to obtain collateral from the other party (Capital Adequacy Regulation Annex-2 / Article 11).
description.MARKET_VALUE: It refers to the market value.
description.MARKET_VALUE_FX: The current market value of the security must be taken into account.
description.MARKET_VALUE_TL: The current market value of the security must be taken into account.
description.MATURITY_DATE: This field indicates the maturity date.
description.MATURITYDATE: This column stores the due date of any overdraft in the account. Otherwise, this can be set to a future date after 99 years by default.
description.MATURITY_GAP: Maturity gap between interest sensitive assets and liabilities (repricing should be taken into account)
description.MONEYNESS: According to the spot price of the underlying of option, it should be selected as I (In-the-Money), A (At-the-Money) or O (Out-of-Money).
description.NAME: Name
description.NEGATIVE_COMMENT_PRESS: Negative comment appeared on printed, visual and social media
description.NET_RETURN_AMT: Refers to the net return amount for the fund component.
description.NEXT_PAYMENT_DATE: This field indicates the next payment date.
description.NEXT_PAYMENT_DATE_PAY: It refers to the date on which the next payment will be made.
description.NEXTREPRICEDATE: The repricing/valuation date must be entered.
description.NEXT_PAYMENT_DATE_REC: It refers to the date on which the next payment will be received.
description.NEXT_REPRICE_DATE: The pricing / valuation date must be entered.
description.NEXT_REPRICE_DATE_PAY: It refers to the date of interest change paid.
description.NEXT_REPRICE_DATE_REC: Refers to the date of interest exchange received.
description.NOMINAL_BUY_AMOUNT_FX: It refers nominal amount for buy side of transaction (FX)
description.NOMINAL_BUY_AMOUNT_SPEC: If the nominal amount subject to the contract can change during the contract period, the relevant buy amount must be entered in this field.
description.NOMINAL_BUY_AMOUNT_TL: It refers nominal amount for buy side of transaction (TRY)
description.NOMINAL_INT_RATE: Refers to the interest rate of the fund component.
description.NOMINAL_SELL_AMOUNT_FX: It refers nominal amount for sell side of transaction (FX)
description.NOMINAL_SELL_AMOUNT_SPEC: If the nominal amount subject to the contract can change during the contract period, the relevant sell amount must be entered in this field.
description.NOMINAL_SELL_AMOUNT_TL: It refers nominal amount for sell side of transaction (TRY)
description.NOMINAL_VALUE: The nominal value of the relevant security is expected to be entered.
description.NONPERFORMING_LOANS: Gross non-performing loans ( interest and income accruals and rediscounts are included)
description.NON_PERFORMING_RECEIVABLES: Gross non-performing loans ( interest and income rediscount are included.)
description.NO_OF_INT_PAYMENTS: Refers to the number of interest payments for the fund component.
description.NUMBER_CUSTOMER_COMPLAINTS: Number of customer complaints (last 1 year including reporting period)
description.NUMBER_LAWSUITS: Number of open lawsuits brought against the company (last 1 year including reporting period)
description.NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES: This field should be filled with the number of employees of the counterparty.
description.OFF_BALANCE_SHEET_ACCS: It is the name of off balance sheet account.
description.OFF_BALANCE_SHEET_ORDER: It is the order of off balance sheet account.
description.OFF_BAL_SHEET_CLASS: It identifies the off balance sheet class of the account.
description.ONE_MONTH_TENOR_ASSETS: Total asset that will mature within a month
description.ONE_MONTH_TENOR_LIAB: Total liabilities that will mature within a month
description.OPEN_DATE: It is the opening date of the account.
description.OPEN_dATE: This value refers the account open date.
description.OPERATIONAL_PHASE_FLG: It should be 1 if the project finance is on the operational phase.
description.OPERATIONAL_RELATIONSHIP_FLA: For the purposes of the BRSA, the deposit / participation funds held at the bank for clearing, custody or cash management services that meet the specifications specified in BRSA ART 15 - 4a-4ç are accepted as operational deposit / participation fund.
description.OPERATIONAL_RISK_GROSS_INCOM: Average of last 3 year's income subject to the operational risk
description.OPERATIONAL_RISK_LOSS: Net amount of operational risk loss events (last 1 year including reporting period)
description.OPERATION_TYPE: Column indicating that the transaction is Repo or Reverse Repo
description.OPER_DEPOSIT_FLG: It is the area that indicates whether the account is operational deposits.
description.ORGINAL_BALANCE: It refers to the original notional amount.
description.ORG_BALANCE: The column stores the original balance of the account.
description.ORG_GROSS_BOOK_BALANCE: Refers to the original gross balance.
description.ORG_PAYMENT_AMT: It is the area that indicates the original payment amount.
description.ORIGINAL_AMOUNT: As of the reporting date, the foreign currency equivalent of the transaction will be written.
description.ORIGINAL_BALANCE: Refers to the original notional amount.
description.ORIGINAL_GROSS_BALANCE: Represents the initial balance at which all flat-rate transfer pricing cash flows are created, including principal flow, prepayments, and interest cash flows.
description.ORIGINAL_INTEREST_RATE: This column stores the contractual interest rate at origination date whereas the interest rate field would store the interest rate applicable to the instrument as on As-of-Date. This is used for computing Effective Interest Rate.
description.ORIGINAL_MATURITY: This stores contractual term as on origination date. Maturity Date = Origination Date + Origination Term
description.ORIGINAL_MATURITY_UNIT: The column stores the tenor unit as D-Days, M-Months and Y- Years.
description.ORIGINAL_TERM: It refers to the original maturity period.
description.ORIGINAL_TERM_UNIT: It refers to the unit of the period used in the original maturity calculation. Selection will be made from the list.
description.ORIG_TERM: It refers to the original maturity period.
description.ORJ_PAR_BALANCE: This column stores the par value - net of participations - at date of origination.
description.OUTSTANDING_CLAIM_RISK: Capital required covering outstanding claim risk
description.OVERDUE_AMT: In this field, overdue amount of the loan must be entered.
description.OWNERSHIP_CATEGORY: This attribute stores the unique code for Ownership Category
description.PAID_SANCTIONS_PENALTIES: Total amount of sanctions&penalties (last 1 year including reporting period)
description.PAST_DUE_RECEIVABLES: Total amount of receivables have past due  days more than 1
description.PAYMENT_AMT: This field indicates the future payment amount. For non-amortized accounts, this value can be 0.
description.PAYMENT_DATE: The column stores the date relevant payment was made.
description.PAYMENT_FREQ: It specifies the frequency of payments.
description.PAYMENT_FREQ_UNIT: Payment Frequency Unit must be selected from the list.
description.PAYMENT_RECEIVED_CURRENT_MON: It is the field that indicates the future payment amount.
description.PD: In this field, probability of default for the loan should be given.
description.PERCENTENCUMBERED: This field represents the collateralized percentage in case of partial collateralization.
description.PERCENT_ENCUMBERED: This column stores the percentage of security encumbered in case of partial encumbrance case.
description.PERIOD_BOOK_BALANCE_END: This column stores end-of-period balance sheet information. It is the sum of the balance at the end of the period and the deferred balance.
description.PORTFOLIO_HOLDING_PERIOD: Average of holding period of portfolio in days
description.PREDICTED_CCF: The internal credit conversion factor prediction of the account should be given.
description.PREMIUM_AMOUNT: It is the price paid for the purchase/sale of the relevant option contract.
description.PREMIUM_CURRENCY: Refers to the currency of the option premium.
description.PRIMARY_RESIDENCE_FLG: This field is generated within the scope of Basel IV; It is used for the criterion of <primary residence of the borrower>.
description.PRINCIPAL_AMOUNT_FX: In this field, the main currency balance defined in the 'Currency' field of the bond / bond will be entered. If the currency / bond is in TL, the same amounts will be entered in the 'Notional Amount (FX)' and 'Notional Amount (TL)' columns.
description.PRINCIPAL_AMOUNT_TL: In this field, the TL equivalent of the principal balance of the bond / bond must be entered. If the currency / bond is in TL, the same amounts will be entered in the 'Principal Amount (FX)' and 'Principal Amount (TL)' columns.
description.PRINCIPAL_AMT: This field stores principal amount of the transaction
description.PRINCIPAL_FX: Principle amount in currency defined in the Currency Cod field will be entered in the Principle FX field. If the account is in local currency, the same amount will be given in the TL and FX fields (TL and FX, these fields must not be null for any line.)
description.PRINCIPAL_PAYMENT_AMOUNT: The column stores the principal amount of the payment made.
description.PRINCIPAL_PMT_FREQ: It is the area that indicates the frequency of principal payments.
description.PRINCIPAL_TL: This column stores the principal amount in local currency. If the account is in local currency, the same amount will be given in the TL and FX fields (TL and FX, these fields must not be null for any line.)
description.PRIN_PMT_FREQ_UNIT: It is the field that indicates the unit regarding the principal payment frequency.
description.PROBABILITY_OF_DEFAULT: Default probability estimate should be entered
description.PRODUCTCODE: Code related to the product (Selection will be made on the list). Trading includes distinctions such as held to maturity.
description.PRODUCT_CODE: Code related to the product (Selection will be made on the list).
description.PRODUCT_MAIN_CATEGORY: Refers to the main category of the product.
description.PRODUCT_SUB_CATEGORY: Refers to the subcategory the product belongs to.
description.PROD_CD: This field specifies the features and types of products in detail and it is specially used for the ALM software.
description.PROJ_CRD_CLASS: The project finance category under Basel IV standard approach must be entered.
description.PROVISION_FOR_VALUE_DECR_FX: In this field, balance sheet balance in foreign currency defined in 'Money Code' field of the bond / bond will be entered. If the currency is in TL, the same amounts will be entered in the 'Provision for decrease in the value of security (FX)' and 'Provision for decrease in the value of security (TL)' columns.
description.PROV_AMRT_IMPAIR_FX: This column stores amortization/provision/impairment balance in original currency.
description.PROV_AMRT_IMPAIR_TL: This column stores amortization/provision/impairment balance in local currency.
description.PURCHASE_DATE: Refers to the purchase date of the fund component.
description.QUOTED_STOCK_MRKT_FLG: If the customer is listed on the stock exchange, it should be fed as 1, otherwise 0.
description.REDISCOUNT_AMT_FX: This field must be filled with the rediscount amount in original currency.

description.REDISCOUNT_INCOME_TL: It refers to the amount of the profit and loss in TL, priced over the mark-to-market value of the transaction.

description.REF_ASS_QUAL_SEC_FLG_TRS_CDS: It refers to whether the reference asset is qualified securities or not. (Valid for TRS and CDS transactions)
description.REMAINING_NO_OF_PAYMENTS: The remaining principal, interest or principal and interest payments will be made from the registration date until the due date. This is used to calculate payment dates on which principal and interest payments occur. Since each payment is made for the lifetime of the instrument, the cash flow engine reduces the number of remaining payments by 1 and advances the payment time according to the frequency of payment. If the newly calculated remaining payments = 1, the cash flow engine no longer changes the frequency of payments and makes the next (and final) payment on the due date. If the number of remaining payments = 0, the registration is invalid. Also, if the Remaining amount of payments = 1, the next payment will be equal to the due date.
description.REMAIN_NO_PMTS: The remaining amount represents the number of payments to be made.
description.REMAIN_NO_PMTS_PAY: It refers to the number of periods to be paid.
description.REMAIN_NO_PMTS_REC: It Refers to the number of periods to be received
description.REMAIN_PMT_CNT: The remaining number of principal, interest, or principal and interest payments to be made from the as of date until the maturity date of the record.
description.REPAYMENT_DEPEND_PROP_CF_FLG: It should be 1 if repayment of the credit depends on the property's cash flow. Otherwise this field should be 0.
description.REPAYMENT_TYPE: This field contains the type of repayment
description.REPORTDATE: The report date will be automatically added to the tables by the system
description.REPORT_DATE: Report date column will be added automatically to the tables by the system.
description.REPO_COLLATERAL_AMT: The fund component represents the collateral amount of the repo.
description.REPRICEFREQ: It expresses the frequency of interest changes.
description.REPRICE_DATE: Date of next scheduled interest rate change for adjustable rate accounts. Next reprice date defines the first forecasted repricing event after the calendar period date.
description.REPRICE_FREQ: Reprice Frequency is used in conjunction with Repricing Frequency Unit to define the frequency of rate change of an account. Repricing Frequency is used to identify whether records are adjustable or not. If Repricing Frequency> 0, the record is considered adjustable. If Reprice Frequency = 0, the record is fixed-rate. It is used to compute the re-price dates after the next_reprice_date. REPRICE_FREQ must be either 0 or positive.
description.REPRICE_FREQ_UNIT: Reprice Frequency unit is used in conjunction with Repricing Frequency to define the frequency of rate change of an account. List of values are days, months & years.
description.REPRICING_DATE: It refers to the date of the first interest change
description.REPRICING_FREQUENCY: Pricing / valuation frequency should be entered.
description.REPRICING_FREQUENCY_UNIT: The pricing / valuation frequency unit should be selected by selecting from the list.
description.REQUIRED_RESERVE_FLG: New deal level flag for liabilities under Required Reserve.
description.REQUIRED_REVERSE_FLG: It is the field that indicates whether there is a mandatory obligatory account.
description.RETAIL_REVOLVING_TYPE: This field will be filled for retail revolving type of products. The selection will be done as either transactors or revolves.
description.REVISED_MAT_DATE: This column stores the revised maturity date. There could be a revision of maturity date due to several reasons such as restructuring, extension of the term etc. In some cases, the financial institutions may approve extension of term of a loan without really restructuring the loan. The term restructuring refers to a notable change in the payment schedule, interest rates, tenor etc of a loan contract.
description.REVISED_MAT_dATE: The revised maturity date should be input in this field.
description.REVOCABLE_FLG: This field indicates whether the credit limit gap in this area is revocable or not for Revolving accounts that is specified in Credit Type field. It should be specified as 'NO' for credit cards, overdraft accounts and other irrevocable limits and 'YES' for revocable limits.
description.RISK_CAP_FX: The USD equivalent of the risk ceiling defined in terms of FC shall be entered.
description.RISK_CAP_TL: The amount of the risk ceiling defined in TL will be entered in TL.
description.RMN_NO_OF_COUPN_PAY: The area in question refers to the remaining number of coupon payments for securities.
description.RULE_END_DATE: This field indicates the expiration date of the rule.
description.RULE_START_DATE: This field indicates the start date on which the rule is valid.
description.SAVING_ACC_FLAG: This field is expected to be filled in as “Tasarruf Olmayan” ('Non-Saving' for EN) by the bank subsidiaries unauthorized to collect deposits. It should be 'Tasarruf' ('Saving' for EN) for banks authorized to collect deposits if the fund is covered by the savings deposit insurance.
description.SCRA_GRADE: This field refers to the internal assessment (SCRA) grade assigned to the customer within the scope of Basel IV. It will be filled as A, B, C.
description.SECOND_AMRT_TERM: It refers to the difference between the last principal payment and the due date.
description.SECOND_AMRT_TERM_UNIT: It refers to the unit of the difference between the last principal payment and the due date.
description.SECOND_INST_MARGIN: It refers to the contractual margin rate added to the pricing index.
description.SECURED_FLG: It is the field that indicates whether the transaction is secured or not.
description.SECURED_IND: This attribute identifies if the exposure is secured with a collateral or not. The collaterals to be considered here will be the collaterals other than margins.
description.SECURED_INDICATOR: It indicates whether the said risk is guaranteed or not.
description.SETTLEMENT_DATE: It refers to the date on which the payment is made and the transfer of the related value to the other party is completed.
description.SETTLEMENT_TYPE: This field indicates how the derivative transaction consensus is made. It will be physical or in cash.
description.SHARE_IN_GROUP: It expresses the share of the relevant fund component within the product group.

description.SIGNIFICANT_CONTROL_DEF_INT: Total significant open findings (internal auditors' findings) - Significant Control Deficiency

description.SIGNIFICANT_FINDINGS_INTERNA: Total significant open findings (internal auditors' findings)
description.SIGNIFICANT_FINDINGS_ISBANK: Total significant open findings (Isbank auditors' findings)
description.SOURCE_INCOME_CURRENCY: This field refers to the currency of the borrower's income source in the 1.5 multiplier application in non-hedged retail and RRE risks that include currency mismatch within the scope of Basel IV.
description.SPOT_PRICE: Indicates the spot price of the security. It should be fed as closing price for stocks. For the bonds, the clean purchase closing price will be taken into consideration. It is the clean buy-off price adjusted for inflation indexed bonds according to the inflation index.
description.START_DATE: It refers to the date when the contract became effective.
description.STOCK_EXC_CONTRACT_NO: Refers to the exchange contract number of the fund component.
description.STRUCTURAL_IRR_NOMINATOR: Amount of biggest decrease in the economic value as a result of the scenarios (Scenario 1: Increase in reporting currency 500 bps, other currencies 200 bps Scenario 2:Decrease in reporting currency 400 bps, other currencies 200 bps)
